task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the profiling plan document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/ngc891_profiling_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent targeted NGC 891 in the astronomy software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos GUI (or similar astronomy software) showing NGC 891 as the active target, with coordinates matching RA ~02h 22m 33s and DEC ~+42d 20m 57s.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured and captured the unbinned V-band sequence into a specific directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a completed or in-progress sequence configured for Filter V (Slot 2), 1x1 binning, exactly 5 frames, with a designated output directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured and captured the binned L-band sequence into a specific directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module showing a completed or in-progress sequence configured for Filter L (Slot 1), 2x2 binning, exactly 5 frames, with a designated output directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent performed a sky field survey of the target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A FITS viewer, Ekos Alignment module, or observation window displaying the captured image field of NGC 891, indicating a survey or inspection of the captured frames was performed.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent generated an observation log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a newly created observation log file containing details about the NGC 891 observation, captured sequences, and survey results.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual astronomy software GUI to perform the captures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the KStars/Ekos GUI being interacted with to set up and run the capture sequences, rather than terminal commands creating mock FITS files or directories.

integrity.description: Verify the observation log is based on actual software outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The observation log should contain specific details from the session (e.g., actual file paths, timestamps, or software status messages) rather than just a verbatim copy-paste of the profiling plan instructions.

integrity.description: Verify the sky survey was performed using local software tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sky survey must be shown within the astronomy software's FITS viewer or alignment tools, not via a web browser search for images of NGC 891.
